name: Death Duel VR
short_description: Experience True HEMA Combat in VR. Step beyond button mashing. Death Duel VR uses physics-based leverage to let you authentically execute historical European martial arts techniques against live opponents. Master real guards, leverage, and tactics in heart-pounding PvP duels to the death.
detailed_description:
Just Updated

Death Duel VR 2.0 – Duelists Redemption is here.
This major update overhauls the game's core systems and introduces five new game modes for up to 4 players. Core Combat Improvements:

  • Netcode Overhaul: A complete networking rebuild ensures smooth, stable, and perfectly synchronized battles.

  • Reforged Weapon Mechanics: Weapons now follow clear rules of leverage and timing. Precision is rewarded, while poor form is punished.

  • New Damage System: Strikes now calculate damage based on precision, edge alignment, and timing.

  • Redesigned HUD: A new UI clearly displays limb/torso/head health, as well as block and guard quality.

  • Weight Rating System: Each weapon now has a distinct identity, from fast light blades to momentum-based heavy weapons.

New 4-Player Game Modes:

  • Bootcamp: A cooperative training ground to learn with friends.

  • 1 on 1: Refined duels in a party-style room.

  • Team Deathmatch: Fight with shared lives, coordinated tactics, and a live scoreboard.

  • Warlord: One armored juggernaut versus the entire lobby.

  • Free-For-All: Total chaotic combat to prove you're the deadliest.


Just Updated

Death Duel VR: Full Release Unleashed – The Ultimate PvP Arena Awaits!

Warriors! The arena calls louder than ever. Death Duel VR emerges from Early Access, transformed and ready for its Full Release! We've honed the blade, deepened the saga, and forged the definitive PvP combat experience you helped create.

Prepare for battle with major upgrades:
⚔️ Masterful Combat Physics: Feel every clash like never before. Revamped physics deliver unparalleled realism in strikes, parries, and movement – where true skill and precision reign supreme.
🎉 New Ways to Conquer: Gather your allies! Challenge rivals in the brand-new Party Room, featuring intense custom duels and unique trial modes for epic showdowns.
📖 Deeper Legends Unfold: Immerse yourself further. Fresh lore and expanded narratives enrich your warrior's path, adding weight to every victory.

To our incredible community: Your relentless feedback, fierce battles, and unwavering support shaped this journey. This victory is yours as much as ours. Thank you for forging Death Duel VR into the ultimate PvP proving ground.

This is more than an update – it's the pinnacle of VR combat. Step into the perfected arena. Claim your glory. Carve your name into legend with Death Duel VR: Full Release!

See you on the battlefield, Champions! 💀

Try the Free To Play! Experience core PvP combat against full-version warriors. Unlock the complete experience with the Elite Package.


About the Game

Free DEMO: Taste Core PvP! Experience core PvP combat in the Free To Play version (DEMO). Fight full-version players in limited combat. Unlock ALL weapons, armours, modes & progression with the Elite Package (FULL GAME).

Hello Duelist’s, This is Community Manager Tyrus Rechs. It has come to my attention that not alot of people know about our discord server.

We primarily engage with the community over discord.gg as it's easier to manage discussions over there.

You may also find people to fight with in the Looking-for-game chat by @ the role that notify people to you willingness to fight.

What is Death Duel VR

Experience Historically Accurate VR Duels, Powered by Physics. Death Duel VR is a competitive online melee combat simulator.

Master authentic HEMA techniques – real guards, strikes, and grappling – against live opponents in physics-driven PvP.

Wield swords, shields, polearms, flails, and more with realistic collision and leverage.

Engage in intense foot combat or test your skill in mounted jousting.

Step into the medieval tournament arena, recreated for VR controllers. Duel with history, duel with skill.

Key features:

Fencing with sword, shield, flail, polearm and etc.
Jousting

Is there Singleplayer Content?


Absolutely! Experience the "Way of the Duelist" roguelike campaign. Hone your techniques solo, collect XP and credits through challenging runs, and unlock legendary weapons to wield in PvP.

To report bugs please post them on Discord where I answer questions most of time.
